top_signals.title: David Bailey’s Nakamoto bitcoin treasury announces 1-for-40 reverse split as shares hit new lows
top_signals.summary: Nakamoto’s reverse split will shrink outstanding shares to about 17.4 million from roughly 696 million, following a 99.5% price drop.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Speech by President von der Leyen at the European Parliament plenary debate on ‘High time to deliver on the Single Market, providing certainty and predictability for EU businesses and quality jobs'
top_signals.summary: European Commission Speech Strasbourg, 20 May 2026 You have chosen the Single Market as central debate topic today – that is very good. Our Single Market is more than a continental marketplace; it is a cornerstone of who we are as Europeans. It binds our citizens, our businesses and our values together. The free movement of goods, services, capital and people. It has delivered decades of growth, jobs and opportunities. It has created better choices for consumers, larger markets for businesses and higher standards across our Union.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
